publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-08 18:11:27 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Student record cards and student lists from the Dairy Industry Department at Cornell.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University. Dairy Industry Department. Winter Course Student Record Cards, #21-19-1190. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Archival Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also New York State College of Agriculture Winter Short Course Scrapbooks, #21-34-4029..

relatedmaterial.head: Related Archival Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also the Michael L. and Catherine H. Whalen Collection of Cornelliana, #37-5-3784..

relatedmaterial.head: Related Archival Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also the New York State College of Agriculture Winter Short Course Photographs, #21-34-2459.

did.unittitle: Winter course grades and student lists
Dairy industry winter course student cards

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cards started to be used consistenly with 1909-1910 course. The nationality of the student is noted in the general notes field when known. All cards contain a photograph of the student, exceptions are noted in the processing note.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: When their home town name changed we have made a note of that in the processing notes. Date of Birth (D.O.B.) added to title when known.

did.unittitle: Abbott, Jesse Jay Hollis; D.O. B. 1888-05-17
Adams, Kendrick La Grange; D.O. B. 1912-05-14
Bach, Christian F. Jr.; D.O. B. 1889-02-14

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Took short course in Creamery and Testing

did.unittitle: Bauer, Frank M. J.; D.O. B. 1889-08-13

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Took one week course for managers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Took one week course for managers

did.unittitle: Bogardus, George Ward Wallace; D.O. B. 1913-11-28

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Took Home Econom. Winter course and then our 10 day course in fancy cheese and ice cream Feb. 1913

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Was a student in General Agriculture Winter Course 1927-1928

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Town site is now underwater due to the construction of the Kinzua Dam

did.unittitle: Caldwell, William George D., Jr.; D.O. B. 1917-12-27
Carrigan, Charles Edmund, III; D.O. B. 1911-08-09

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: African American - professor at Alabama A&M

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Visitor in butter and fancy cheese labs for about 1 week Jan 1913

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Started in 1910-1911 course but switched to General Agriculture for that Winter session

did.unittitle: Collins, Harold Dean, Jr.; D.O. B. 1918-01-22
Connelly, Joseph Francis, Jr.; D.O. B. 1914-04-02

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Married Ray Eugene Deuel an instructor in the Cornell College of Agriculture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Withdrew from course and took it again in 1913-1914

did.unittitle: Coulter, Frank Wesley, Jr.; D.O. B. 1894-03-30
Cronin, Walter L., Jr.; D.O. B. 1916-06-25
Currie, Byron La Grange; D.O. B. 1877-10-19

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Town site is now under the Pepacton Reservoir

did.unittitle: Davis, Joseph Ernest, Jr.; D.O. B. 1888-12-07

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also took one week course for managers 1913

did.unittitle: Dodds, David Leslie, Jr.; D.O. B. 1893-09-04

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Card not filled out except for one employer on back

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Card not filled out except for one employer on back

did.unittitle: Eldred, Maurice C., Jr.; D.O. B. 1888-02-18

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Took one week course for managers

did.unittitle: Geesler, Floyd David, Jr.; D.O. B. 1917-09-16
Glendinning, John R., Jr.; D.O. B. 1909-11-05

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Took the one week course for managers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also took two week course in 1926-1927

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also took special 10 day course in 1910

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: African American - educated in British Guiana

did.unittitle: Haff, Edwy Colfax, Jr.; D.O. B. 1902-12-14

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Very little information on front of card, some job information on back

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also took the manager's course in 1915

did.unittitle: Harvey, John E., Jr.; D.O. B. 1914-09-25
Hazel, George Alexander, Jr.; D.O. B. 1896-09-11
Huey, Martin Van Buren; D.O. B. 1875-11-17
Janssen, Frederick William, Jr.; D.O. B. 1904-08-08

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Started course in 1910 but withdrew due to illness

did.unittitle: Kalahan, John James, Jr.; D.O. B. 1919-07-06

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also took course in 1897 and took 10 day course in 1910

did.unittitle: Minard, Frank Austin, Jr.; D.O. B. 1895-06-23
Morse, Walter Elias Tallman; D.O. B. 1886-08-18
Morton, Alfred E., Jr.; D.O. B. 1889-11-16

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lamontville is now Hurley, New York

Rich, Paul John, Jr.; D.O. B. 1911-10-20

scopecontent.p: Took some parts of the course again in 1924-25
